title: Phenolic profile of a Parma violet unveiled by chemical and fluorescence imaging.
author: Khatib M Pouzet C Lafitte C Chervin J Bonzon-Ponnet V Jauneau A Esquerre-Tugaye MT
content: S-EPMC8300547 PMC8300547 Phenolic profile of a Parma violet unveiled by chemical and fluorescence imaging. The ability of phenolic compounds to autofluoresce upon illumination by UV or blue light was exploited to explore the nature and distribution of these metabolites within the flower petals
